subcodes.title: Words to some Persian Baha'is, spoken on 1913-10-23
subcodes.first_line: We summon the people to severance and enkindlement. We call their attention to spirituality. We have nothing to do with political tricks and chicaneries.
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @non-participation in politics, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @realms of being; three realms; five realms
